name: astro-consent
description: A privacy-first, GDPR-compliant cookie consent banner for Astro with a built-in preferences modal, zero dependencies, and full theme control.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cli.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');fs.renameSync('dist/cli.js','dist/cli.cjs');fs.renameSync('dist/templates/cssTemplate.js','dist/templates/cssTemplate.cjs');let s=fs.readFileSync('dist/cli.cjs','utf8');s=s.replace('./templates/cssTemplate.js','./templates/cssTemplate.cjs');fs.writeFileSync('dist/cli.cjs',s);fs.chmodSync('dist/cli.cjs',0o755);"
